mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.name AS departmentName FROM EMPLOYEE e LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.department_id = d.id e.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
mapper.update: UPDATE `EMPLOYEE` set account = #{account}, password = #{password}, role = #{role}, name = #{name}, sex = #{sex}, no = #{no}, age = #{age}, description = #{description}, department_id = #{departmentId}, avatar = #{avatar} WHERE id = #{id}
